column1: # Teaching Example - Demonstrates clear linear dose-response relationship
# Use For: Teaching basic dose-response concepts
# Scenario: Alcohol consumption and liver disease risk
# This dataset was constructed to show a CLEAN linear relationship
# Each additional drink/day increases risk by ~20%
#   β₂ (Quadratic):  Approximately 0 or very small (NOT significant
#   - Each additional drink/day increases log rate by ~0.18
#   - No evidence of non-linearity (β₂ not significant)
#   - This is by design - studies were constructed to be homogeneous
#   2. Low I² indicates consistent results across studies
#   3. Linear trend: risk increases steadily with dose
